User-agent: *

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://vglecheflan.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin routes from search engines
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /checkout

# Allow public pages
Allow: /
Allow: /shop
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
